title: Toyota, Hyundai and Chinese automakers expected to be most impacted by Iran war
summary_full: While regional sales will be impacted, the closing of the Strait of Hormuz and rising oil prices will have ripple effects across the global automotive industry.
summary_public: While regional sales will be impacted, the closing of the Strait of Hormuz and rising oil prices will have ripple effects across the global automotive industry.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: rising oil prices will have ripple effects across the global automotive industry.
